case_title: MARIE ARLENE KOSSMAN VS. MIKYUNG KIM ET AL

docket_entries.description: PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE OCT-17-2019.

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
